title: for loops take long for yosys to compile

features.name: large iteration count for loop
features.description: Code should include a for loop with a very large iteration count (thousands of iterations)

features.name: for loop with conditional non-blocking assignments
features.description: Code should include a for loop with an if statement containing non-blocking assignments inside the loop body
features.snippet: for(i=0; i<50000; i=i+1) begin if(v) begin v <= ~v; w <= w+1; end end

features.name: for loop with large bit-width counter
features.description: Code should include a for loop using a counter with large bit width (over 200 bits)
features.snippet: reg [220:0] i; for(i=0; i<50000; i=i+1) begin end
